response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, leadership in AI-agent infrastructure, and exposure to MCP and cloud platforms, but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years in production-grade AI solutions, vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph, and his education lacks a graduate degree in AI/CS, which weakens alignment with core GenAI requirements.
strengths: Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Proven leadership in full-stack development and technical mentoring across multiple roles
Strong cloud and DevOps exposure via AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines
concerns: No clear documentation of 8+ years building production-grade AI systems (vs. general software)
Missing explicit experience with vector databases, RAG, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI
No advanced degree in AI/CS; limited evidence of LLM optimization or evaluation pipeline design
